problem: Healthcare organizations need integrated pharmacy management to prevent medication errors, manage drug interactions, and ensure safe medication therapy across inpatient and outpatient settings.
solution: Comprehensive pharmacy solutions integrated with EHR including inpatient pharmacy with drug interaction checking via Multum Drug Database, outpatient pharmacy with e-prescribing, pharmacy inventory management, and clinical surveillance for medication misuse. Provides real-time alerts, automated workflows, and unified medication profiles.
